title: AI .NET Developer (Mid-Level)
company_focus:
Federal digital services and technology solutions for
government agencies
description:
Who we are:

Tria Federal delivers digital services and technology
solutions that support the health and safety of veterans,
service members and civilians. For two decades, federal
agencies have relied on Tria companies to advance their
critical missions and modernize their systems, so that they
can uphold their commitment to the American people. Today,
we are pushing the boundaries of possibility through
partnerships and investments in artificial intelligence and
emerging technologies, developing solutions for the biggest
challenges that government will face tomorrow.

We are proud to employ and support military veterans who
bring mission-first mindset, technical expertise, and
leadership qualities that strengthen our work. Veterans,
transitioning service members, and military spouses are
strongly encouraged to apply.

The successful candidate will be able to work in a diverse
SAFe/Agile, .NET, environment with minimal supervision and
constantly changing requirements. This is a mid-level
position, and the candidate will be expected to provide team
and technical leadership, communications, and coordination.

Required Skills:

- Experience in development of secure web applications using
  .Net 4.x Framework
- Experience in C#, Webforms, MVC, Web API, ADO.Net, Entity
  Framework.
- Must be able to acquire a Public Trust security clearance
- Experience with web-service development, in SOAP/XML, REST,
  JSON, WSD, jQuery, Bootstrap, Ajax, CSS
- Strong knowledge of Object-Oriented concepts, principals,
  and patterns
- Experience with Agile/Scrum Methodology
- Applicant must be able to work in the U.S. without
  sponsorship
- Familiarity with Microsoft Azure, DEVOP/CICD Pipeline, OWASP
  vulnerabilities
- Experience with GITHUB or GIT
- Experience in creating and maintaining SQL tables, views,
  stored procedures, functions and triggers
- Experience with SSDT, MS SSRS
- Experience in .NET Core Framework
- Experience in SAFe Agile

Responsibilities:

- Perform complex analysis, design, development, testing, and
  debugging of computer software.
- Maintain responsibility for activities that range from
  software design, coding, unit testing, and orchestration.
- Participate as an active member of the scrum team, providing
  input to team velocity and sprint ceremonies, planning,
  demonstrations and retrospectives

Technologies:

- LLM Frameworks & Tools: LangChain, LlamaIndex, Haystack,
  LangGraph, DSPy, Semantic Kernel (Microsoft)
- Vector Databases: Azure AI Search (vector search), Pinecone,
  Weaviate, Qdrant, ChromaDB, Azure Cosmos DB for MongoDB
  vCore
- Embedding Models: Azure OpenAI embeddings (text-embedding-
  ada-002, text-embedding-3), Cohere, or open-source models
  (Sentence-Transformers, BGE, E5)
- LLM APIs & Deployment: Azure OpenAI Service (GPT-4, GPT-4
  Turbo, GPT-3.5), Anthropic, prompt flow for orchestration
- Agent Frameworks: ReAct, function calling, tool integration,
  memory systems, planning algorithms (Tree-of-Thoughts,
  ReWOO), Azure AI Agent Service
- Evaluation Tools: RAGAS, TruLens, DeepEval, Azure AI
  Evaluation SDK, or custom evaluation harnesses; A/B
  testing for LLM applications

Azure Cloud & AI Services

- Azure OpenAI Service: Model deployment, API management,
  content filtering, quota management, and responsible AI
  features
- Azure AI Search: Semantic search, vector search, hybrid
  search configurations, indexers, skillsets, and search
  analytics
- Azure AI Services: Document Intelligence (form recognizer),
  Computer Vision, Speech Services, Language Understanding
- Azure Data Services: Cosmos DB, Azure SQL, Blob Storage,
  Data Lake, Azure Data Factory for data pipelines
- Azure ML & MLOps: Azure Machine Learning, Model Registry,
  MLflow integration, Prompt Flow, Azure DevOps for CI/CD
- Azure Security & Governance: Azure Key Vault, Managed
  Identities, RBAC, Azure Monitor, Application Insights,
  compliance frameworks
- Design and implement end-to-end RAG pipelines including
  document ingestion, chunking strategies, embedding
  generation, vector storage, retrieval mechanisms, and
  context-aware response generation

Why Tria? What defines the Tria brand is more than just our
dedication to excellence in our craft; it’s our incredible
team of dedicated, talented, and passionate people that make
Tria so exceptional. As people powering possible, we are all
partners in our team’s shared success.

As a company that cares about people, we seek to cultivate a
culture in which all can thrive personally and
professionally. We offer a top-tier benefits package to
invest in your physical, mental, and financial health and
wellness so that you can be your best self - at work and in
life. At Tria, we are growth-minded, entrepreneurial in
spirit, and committed to fostering a culture of inclusion
and opportunity for all. Whatever your background, your
role, your department, or stage in your professional
journey, here you will have opportunities to learn new
skills, seize new challenges, and advance your career as we
grow.

California Consumer Privacy Act (CCPA)

We are committed to protecting your privacy. As part of our
compliance with the California Consumer Privacy Act (CCPA),
we want to inform you about how we collect, use, and protect
your personal information during the job application
process. For more details, please review
https://www.oag.ca.gov/privacy/ccpa.
responsibilities: Design and implement end-to-end RAG pipelines including document ingestion, chunking strategies, embedding generation, vector storage, retrieval mechanisms, and context-aware response generation
Perform complex analysis, design, development, testing, and debugging of computer software supporting AI/LLM features
Build and integrate LLM-powered applications using frameworks like LangChain, LangGraph, LlamaIndex, Semantic Kernel, and DSPy
Deploy and manage Azure OpenAI Service models, Azure AI Search, and related Azure AI services
Develop and maintain secure .NET web applications as the platform backbone for AI solutions
Participate as an active member of the scrum team in sprint ceremonies, planning, demonstrations, and retrospectives
Implement agent frameworks with function calling, tool integration, memory systems, and planning algorithms
Evaluate LLM applications using RAGAS, TruLens, DeepEval, and A/B testing frameworks
use_cases: RAG-based document retrieval and question answering for federal agencies
Intelligent search over government documents using vector and semantic search
Document intelligence and form processing for government workflows
AI-powered agent systems with tool integration and multi-step reasoning
LLM application evaluation and quality assurance in production environments
Veteran and service member health and safety technology solutions
ai_classification_reasoning:
This role involves designing and implementing end-to-end RAG
pipelines, working with LLM frameworks (LangChain,
LlamaIndex, Semantic Kernel), vector databases, embedding
models, agent frameworks, and Azure OpenAI services. Despite
the .NET developer title, the extensive listed technologies
and responsibilities around RAG, LLM orchestration, and AI
evaluation clearly position this as an AI-first role
building and deploying AI/GenAI systems.
